summary: Added 6 new today.header.greeting.* keys across all 19 locales with LLM-drafted translations. Wrapped each of the 6 return branches of TodayView.headerGreeting in String(localized:). Both standardDashboardHeader (line 1187) and compactHeightDashboardHeader (line 1241) display Text(headerGreeting) — the inner Text path is unchanged because the returned value is now already-localized. In-place wrap; no Domain boundary impact (headerGreeting is in Features/). localization-parity 19/345/13.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-header-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
missing_proof_levels: running-app-smoke per locale (Today header greeting in each entry state)

contract_status_changes.before: TodayView.headerGreeting returned raw English from 6 branches: 'Day complete', 'In progress', 'Day in progress', 'Ready when you are', 'Today's plan', 'What's active today?'. Two display paths (standardDashboardHeader + compactHeightDashboardHeader) showed these via Text(headerGreeting), so non-English users saw English at the top of the Today tab in every state.
contract_status_changes.after: Each return branch wraps the value in String(localized:) with a today.header.greeting.* key. 6 new keys across 19 locales. The two display paths are unchanged.

residual_risks: LLM-drafted translations are unverified by a native speaker. Some compact-form keys (e.g., 'In progress' shortened) may not match the conventional brevity for that locale; native review needed.

today.header.greeting.inProgress.compact and today.header.greeting.inProgress.regular share the same English-language semantic — both mean 'the day is underway'. A native reviewer may prefer to use just one localized string for both layouts in some languages.

headerGreeting branches depend on usesAccessibilityCompactHeader and usesCompactHeightAccessibilityLayout. Each branch only renders under specific accessibility/Dynamic Type conditions; the build cannot exhaust all of them in one run. Manual VoiceOver / Dynamic Type testing per locale would close the loop.

Per-locale review return files snapshot 372 entries from 2026-05-16; the 6 new keys are NOT reflected there. Run python3 Tools/localization-return-files-refresh.py --apply to refresh when convenient (housekeeping).
Native review remains outstanding for every locale.
recommended_next_reason: Next priority queued slice. Continue row subtitles ('Due today' / 'Protocol run' / 'In progress') are visible on every Today screenshot from 2026-05-16 — high impact, narrow scope, Core/Application-located so structural refactor is appropriate.
